evaluators.name: NY Female Fashion Model Shortlist Under $150 with 4.5+ Rating for Sept 2026 Date
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched with correct filters and added at least one qualifying New York female fashion model (<= $150/hr, rating >= 4.5) to the default shortlist for an available day in September 2026.

evaluators.name: Casting Call for 3 Male LA Fitness Models at Up to $100/hour in Oct 2026
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created a published casting call in Los Angeles for male fitness models, needing at least 3 talents at <= $100/hour for a shoot day in October 2026.

evaluators.name: Register Chicago Fashion Model Profile with 2+ Languages and Consecutive November Availability
evaluators.description: Checks that the current talent profile is a Chicago-based fashion model with at least two languages and that this profile has two consecutive available days in November 2026.

evaluators.name: Book Higher-Reach Shortlisted Model Under $150/hr for 4 Hours in Dec 2026 Within $600 Budget
evaluators.description: Checks that the user compared at least two shortlist models with hourly rate <= $150, then created a December 2026 4-hour booking under $600 for the compared model with the highest social reach.

evaluators.name: Favorites List with 2 Female and 2 Male Miami Models Aged 20–30
evaluators.description: Checks that there is a favorites list containing at least 2 female and 2 male Miami-based models aged 20–30, and optionally that such a list is composed entirely of qualifying Miami models.

evaluators.name: Message First 3 Bilingual LA Commercial Actors (English & Spanish, 4+ Stars) with Same Casting Inquiry
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched for LA commercial actors who speak both English and Spanish with rating >= 4, and sent a message including all first-result qualifying talents as recipients.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Monthly Basic Talent-Scouting Plan Under $100 to Review
evaluators.description: Checks that the user proceeded to review for a monthly Basic-tier talent-scouting plan under $100 and that the selected plan is the cheapest qualifying option.

evaluators.name: Register 2 Seats for Earliest Post–Aug 1, 2026 NY Intro to Modeling Workshop with Pay-Later/On-Site Option
evaluators.description: Checks that the user registered exactly 2 seats for the earliest New York Intro to Modeling workshop after August 1, 2026, using a pay-on-site or pay-later style option.
